comment: There's a bug with the app all of a sudden. Now when you press the mike button to speak, it vibrates but it's not transcribing. And if it doesn't transcribe, it can't translate either. I can't even type the text. It won't let me. And sometimes the copy paste doesn't work for the translation.
key sentence: The key words: mike button, speak, transcribe, translate, type, copy paste
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Navigate up', 'description': 'Click to navigate up'}, {'name': 'More options', 'description': 'Click to see more options'}, {'name': 'Speak', 'description': 'Speak to perform voice input'}, {'name': 'Transcribe', 'description': 'Click to transcribe voice input'}, {'name': 'Language selection', 'description': 'Select language for translation'}, {'name': 'Swap languages', 'description': 'Click to swap the input and output languages for translation'}, {'name': 'Select language', 'description': 'Select a specific language for translation'}, {'name': 'Stop dictation', 'description': 'Click to stop voice input or dictation'}]
